### Local Execution
**Checkout plan branch:** ```bash {s.checkout} ```"""

session.assistant: Now let me read the config schema and context helpers to update them:
session.tool_result:
1→"""Pydantic schemas for erk configuration. 2→ 3→These schemas serve as the single source of truth for: 4→- Configuration field names and CLI keys 5→- Field descriptions (for `erk config keys`) 6→- Configuration levels (global-only vs overridable vs repo-only) 7→- Display formatting 8→""" 9→ 10→from __future__ import annotations 11→ 12→from collections.abc import Iterator 13→from enum import StrEnum 14→ 15→from pydantic import BaseModel, Field 16→ 17→ 18→class ConfigLevel(StrEnum): 19→ """Defines where a configuration key can be set. 20→ 21→ GLOBAL_ONLY: Can only be set in ~/.erk/config.toml 22→ OVERRIDABLE: Can be set at global, repo (.erk/config.toml), or local level 23→ REPO_ONLY: Can only be set in repository config (not global) 24→ """ 25→ 26→ GLOBAL_ONLY = "global_only" 27→ OVERRIDABLE = "overridable" 28→ REPO_ONLY = "repo_only" 29→ 30→
... [301 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Helper functions for accessing context dependencies with LBYL checks. 2→ 3→This module provides getter functions that encapsulate the "Look Before You Leap" 4→pattern for accessing dependencies from the ErkContext. These functions: 5→ 6→1. Check that context is initialized 7→2. Return the typed dependency 8→3. Exit with clear error message if context is missing 9→ 10→This eliminates code duplication across kit CLI commands. 11→""" 12→ 13→from __future__ import annotations 14→ 15→from pathlib import Path 16→ 17→import click 18→ 19→from erk_shared.context.context import ErkContext 20→from erk_shared.context.types import LoadedConfig, NoRepoSentinel 21→from erk_shared.core.prompt_executor import PromptExecutor 22→from erk_shared.gateway.branch_manager.abc import BranchManager 23→from erk_shared.gateway.claude_installation.abc import ClaudeInstallation 24→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import Git 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.abc import LocalGitHub 26→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 27→from erk_shared.gateway.time.abc import Time 28→from erk_shared.plan_store.backend import PlanBackend 29→ 30→
... [454 lines omitted] ...
32→ """Get the full ErkContext, exiting with error if not initialized. 35→ initialized (ctx.obj is None), prints error to stderr and exits with code 1. 54→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 58→ click.echo("Error: Context must be ErkContext", err=True) 65→ """Get GitHub Issues from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 68→ initialized (ctx.obj is None), prints error to stderr and exits with code 1. 87→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 91→ click.echo("Error: Context must be ErkContext", err=True) 98→ """Get repo root from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 120→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 124→ click.echo("Error: Context must be ErkContext", err=True) 129→ click.echo("Error: Not in a git repository", err=True) 161→ """Get Git from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 183→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 190→ """Get GitHub from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 212→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 219→ """Get current working directory from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 241→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 248→ """Get ClaudeInstallation from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 269→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 296→ ... # handle error 305→ """Get PromptExecutor from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 326→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 333→ """Get local config from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 354→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 384→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 398→ """Get PlanBackend from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 419→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 426→ """Get Time from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 447→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True) 454→ """Get BranchManager from context, exiting with error if not initialized. 475→ click.echo("Error: Context not initialized", err=True)

python3 -c "
import subprocess, sys
from pathlib import Path

files = [
    'src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/close_pr.py',
    'src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/close_prs.py',
    'src/erk/cli/commands/objective_helpers.py',
    'src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py',
    'src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py',
    'src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py',
    'src/erk/tui/actions/navigation.py',
    'src/erk/tui/app.py',
    'src/erk/tui/operations/workers.py',
    'src/erk/tui/screens/check_runs_screen.py',
    'src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py',
    'src/erk/tui/screens/plan_body_screen.py',
    'src/erk/tui/screens/plan_detail_screen.py',
    'src/erk/tui/screens/unresolved_comments_screen.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_actions.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_app_filtering.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_app_runs.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_async_operations.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_command_palette.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_core.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_filter_mode.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_incremental_dispatch.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_one_shot_prompt.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_operation_tracking.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_plan_body_screen.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_streaming.py',
    'tests/tui/app/test_view_switching.py',
    'tests/tui/data/test_fetch_objective_content.py',
    'tests/tui/data/test_fetch_plan_content.py',
    'tests/tui/data/test_provider.py',
    'tests/tui/screens/test_check_runs_screen.py',
    'tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py',
]

base = Path('/Users/schrockn/.erk/repos/erk/worktrees/erk-slot-11')
errors = 0
for f in files:
    result = subprocess.run(['python3', '-m', 'py_compile', str(base / f)], capture_output=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print(f'FAIL: {f}')
        print(result.stderr.decode())
        errors += 1
if errors == 0:
    print(f'All {len(files)} files pass syntax check')
"

{"parentUuid":"4a160b80-d1f1-4e3f-b73b-b0540adf1791","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/schrockn/.erk/repos/erk/worktrees/erk-slot-11","sessionId":"c8de6f3b-476c-490b-8af7-ae99160bd325","version":"2.1.71","gitBranch":"plnd/O9109-rename-plan-to-pr-ph-03-09-2222","agentId":"aba685cc778d51210","slug":"clever-sprouting-shamir","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01W7G61iigfJ4m9MfUjv7jYq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"=== LibCST Refactoring Results ===

Task: Rename plan_service gateway references to pr_service across the codebase

Files modified: 33

- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/close_pr.py`
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/close_prs.py`
- `src/erk/cli/commands/objective_helpers.py`
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py`
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py`
- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py`
- `src/erk/tui/actions/navigation.py`
- `src/erk/tui/app.py`
- `src/erk/tui/operations/workers.py`
- `src/erk/tui/screens/check_runs_screen.py`
- `src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py`
- `src/erk/tui/screens/plan_body_screen.py`
- `src/erk/tui/screens/plan_detail_screen.py`
- `src/erk/tui/screens/unresolved_comments_screen.py`
- 19 test files under `tests/tui/`

Changes:
- Import paths: `erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.{abc,real,fake}` → `erk_shared.gateway.pr_service.{abc,real,fake}`
- Class names: `PlanService` → `PrService`, `RealPlanService` → `RealPrService`, `FakePlanService` → `FakePrService`
- Method attribute calls: `.close_plan(` → `.close_pr(`, `.fetch_plan_content(` → `.fetch_pr_content(`

Intentionally excluded:
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/pr_service/` (already updated)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/command_executor/` (has independent `close_plan` interface)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/` (has independent `close_plan` interface)
- `tests/unit/fakes/test_fake_command_executor.py` (tests CommandExecutor's `close_plan`, not PrService)
- `tests/unit/plan_store/` (tests PlanBackend's `close_plan`, not PrService)

Remaining `PlanService`/`close_plan` mentions are confined to docstrings and comments only (not code identifiers) - LibCST correctly preserved these.

session.assistant: The libcst-refactor agent completed successfully - it updated 33 files for PlanService imports and method calls. Now let me launch another agent for the remaining field access renames:

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Batch rename field accesses across codebase

Perform the following attribute/field access renames across the erk codebase at `/Users/sc...[truncated 3404 chars]...NotFound(pr_id=...)`

session.user:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.
Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: The user invoked `/erk:plan-implement` to implement GitHub plan #9110: "Rename 'plan' terminology to 'pr' — Phase 1 (Core Types & Gateway)". This is part of Objective #9109 to rename internal "plan" terminology to "pr" across all APIs, since these entities are actually GitHub draft PRs. The plan covers renaming across `packages/erk-shared/` and `src/erk/`, touching 80+ files.
2. Key Technical Concepts: - Erk plan-oriented engineering workflow with worktrees - `libcst-refactor` agent for batch Python AST-based renames - Gateway ABC pattern (PlanService → PrService) with real/fake implementations - Discriminated union executor events (ExecutorEvent types) - Frozen dataclasses for types (CreatePlanDraftPRResult, CommandResult, etc.) - Metadata schema migration functions for backward compatibility - LBYL (Look Before You Leap) Python coding standard - Background async agents for parallel batch operations
3. Files and Code Sections:
**Gateway Directory (git mv)** - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_service/` → renamed to `pr_service/` via `git mv`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/pr_service/__init__.py`** - Updated docstring: PlanService → PrService, RealPlanService → RealPrService, FakePlanService → FakePrService
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/pr_service/abc.py`** - Class renamed: `PlanService` → `PrService` - Methods renamed: `close_plan(plan_id, plan_url)` → `close_pr(pr_number, pr_url)`, `fetch_plan_content(plan_id, plan_body)` → `fetch_pr_content(pr_number, pr_body)`, `fetch_objective_content(plan_id, plan_body)` → `fetch_objective_content(pr_number, pr_body)`, `dispatch_to_queue(plan_id, plan_url)` → `dispatch_to_queue(pr_number, pr_url)`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/pr_service/real.py`** - Class renamed: `RealPlanService` → `RealPrService` - Import updated: `from erk_shared.gateway.pr_service.abc import PrService` - All method signatures updated accordingly - `_close_linked_prs_http(plan_id, ...)` → `_close_linked_prs_http(pr_number, ...)`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/pr_service/fake.py`** - Class renamed: `FakePlanService` → `FakePrService` - Import updated: `from erk_shared.gateway.pr_service.abc import PrService` - `_plan_content_by_plan_id` → `_pr_content_by_pr_number` - `_objective_content_by_plan_id` → `_objective_content_by_pr_number` - `set_plan_content(plan_id, ...)` → `set_pr_content(pr_number, ...)` - `set_objective_content(plan_id, ...)` → `set_objective_content(pr_number, ...)`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/types.py`** - `Plan.plan_identifier` → `Plan.pr_identifier` - `CreatePlanResult.plan_id` → `CreatePlanResult.pr_id` - `PlanNotFound.plan_id` → `PlanNotFound.pr_id`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/create_plan_draft_pr.py`** - `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.plan_number` → `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.pr_number` - `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.plan_url` → `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.pr_url` - Updated all uses within the function body: `plan_number=None` → `pr_number=None`, `plan_url=None` → `pr_url=None`, `result.plan_id` → `result.pr_id`, error message updated
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/prompt_executor.py`** - Deleted `PlanNumberEvent` dataclass entirely - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` from `ExecutorEvent` union type - Removed `plan_number: int | None` field from `CommandResult` - Removed `plan_number` variable tracking in `execute_command` method - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` case from match statement in `execute_command` - Removed `plan_number=plan_number` from `CommandResult` construction
**`src/erk/core/prompt_executor.py`** - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` from imports - Removed `text_plan_number = text_metadata.get("plan_number")` block and `yield PlanNumberEvent(...)` - Removed `plan_number_value = parsed.get("plan_number")` block and `yield PlanNumberEvent(...)` - Removed `"plan_number": None` from result dict - Removed `result["plan_number"] = pr_metadata.get("plan_number")` line
**`src/erk/core/codex_output_parser.py`** - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` from imports - Removed `plan_number = metadata.get("plan_number")` block and `events.append(PlanNumberEvent(...))`
**`src/erk/cli/output.py`** - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` from imports - In `format_implement_summary`: removed `plan_number` variable, removed "Linked Plan" display block - In `stream_command_with_feedback`: removed `plan_number` variable, removed `PlanNumberEvent` match case, removed `plan_number=plan_number` from `CommandResult` return - In `stream_rebase` and `stream_diverge_fix`: removed `PlanNumberEvent` from no-op match cases
**`src/erk/core/output_filter.py`** - `extract_pr_metadata`: removed `plan_number` from return dict and docstring - `extract_pr_metadata_from_text`: removed `plan_number` from result dict, removed `issue_match` pattern and `result["plan_number"]` assignment
**`tests/fakes/prompt_executor.py`** - Removed `PlanNumberEvent` from imports - Removed `simulated_plan_number: int | None = None` parameter from `__init__` - Removed `self._simulated_plan_number` attribute - Removed `PlanNumberEvent(number=self._simulated_plan_number)` yield - Removed `plan_number=None` and `plan_number=self._simulated_plan_number` from `CommandResult` constructions
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/output/next_steps.py`** - `PlanNextSteps.plan_number` → `PlanNextSteps.pr_number` - All `self.plan_number` → `self.pr_number` in properties - `format_plan_next_steps_plain(plan_number, ...)` → `format_plan_next_steps_plain(pr_number, ...)` - `format_next_steps_markdown(plan_number, ...)` → `format_next_steps_markdown(pr_number, ...)` - `PlanNextSteps(plan_number=plan_number, ...)` → `PlanNextSteps(pr_number=pr_number, ...)`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/schemas.py`** - Replaced `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number()` with `_migrate_to_pr_number()` which handles both `issue_number` and `plan_number` → `pr_number` migration - `WorktreeCreationSchema`: `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number` → `_migrate_to_pr_number`, optional field `"plan_number"` → `"pr_number"` - `PlanSchema`: `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number` → `_migrate_to_pr_number`, required field `"plan_number"` → `"pr_number"` - `SubmissionQueuedSchema`: `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number` → `_migrate_to_pr_number`, required field `"plan_number"` → `"pr_number"` - `WorkflowStartedSchema`: `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number` → `_migrate_to_pr_number`, required field `"plan_number"` → `"pr_number"` - **Kept as-is:** `PLAN_COMMENT_ID`, `plan_comment_id` in PlanHeaderSchema (persisted YAML keys in GitHub bodies)
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py`** - `LoadedConfig.plans_repo` → `LoadedConfig.github_repo` (all occurrences replaced)
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/config/schema.py`** - `RepoConfigSchema.plans_repo` → `RepoConfigSchema.github_repo` (field name; CLI key `"plans.repo"` kept same)
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/helpers.py`** - Updated docstring comment: `config.plans_repo` → `config.github_repo`
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/gt/types.py`** - `PreAnalysisResult.plan_number: int | None = None` → `PreAnalysisResult.pr_number: int | None = None`
**libcst-refactor Agent 1 (completed)** - 33 files modified: - Files in `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/`, `src/erk/cli/commands/`, `src/erk/tui/` (actions, app, operations, screens), `tests/tui/` (19 test files) - Changes: import paths `plan_service.{abc,real,fake}` → `pr_service.{abc,real,fake}`, class names `PlanService/RealPlanService/FakePlanService` → `PrService/RealPrService/FakePrService`, method calls `.close_plan(` → `.close_pr(`, `.fetch_plan_content(` → `.fetch_pr_content(`
**libcst-refactor Agent 2 (running in background)** - handles field access renames: - `.plan_identifier` → `.pr_identifier` - `.plan_id` → `.pr_id` - `.plan_number` → `.pr_number` (on CreatePlanDraftPRResult, PlanNextSteps, PreAnalysisResult) - `.plan_url` → `.pr_url` - `.plans_repo` → `.github_repo` - Constructor keyword argument renames
4. Errors and fixes: - **"File has not been read yet" error**: When trying to `Write` to `pr_service/abc.py` after `git mv` (the new path hadn't been read). Fixed by reading the new path first before writing. Same happened for `real.py` and `fake.py` - all fixed by reading the renamed paths first.
5. Problem Solving: - The massive rename (80+ files) was split into two strategies: manual edits for core type definitions (abc, real, fake, types.py, etc.) and libcst-refactor agents for bulk consumer file updates - First libcst-refactor agent handled import/class/method-name renames across 33 TUI and CLI files - Second libcst-refactor agent (running) handles field attribute access renames across remaining ~127 files - Metadata schema migration function was unified to handle both legacy `issue_number` and legacy `plan_number` → new `pr_number`, providing double backward-compatibility
6. All user messages: - The user invoked `/erk:plan-implement` (a skill/slash command), which loaded the `erk:plan-implement` skill and triggered the automated implementation workflow. No other user messages were present beyond this single invocation.
7. Pending Tasks: - Wait for libcst-refactor Agent 2 (field access renames) to complete - Run verification grep sweeps: `grep -r "plan_service" packages/erk-shared/src/` (zero hits), `grep -r "PlanService" packages/erk-shared/src/ src/erk/` (zero hits), `grep -r "PlanNumberEvent" src/ packages/ tests/` (zero hits), `grep -r "\.plan_id\b" packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/` (zero hits) - Signal GitHub `ended` - Upload session for async learn - Clean up impl context (`erk exec cleanup-impl-context`) - Run CI iteratively (`make fast-ci`) - Submit PR (`erk pr submit`) - Signal lifecycle `submitted` - Run `erk pr check --stage=impl`
8. Current Work: The implementation was mid-execution at Step 8 (Update all importers/consumers). The second libcst-refactor agent was launched in background to handle field access renames (`.plan_number` → `.pr_number`, `.plan_id` → `.pr_id`, `.plan_url` → `.pr_url`, `.plan_identifier` → `.pr_identifier`, `.plans_repo` → `.github_repo`) across ~127 files. The agent ID is `a36c2e70a827d43ff`.
The most recent action was: ``` Launched libcst-refactor agent for field access renames across: - src/ packages/ tests/ --include="*.py" - Renames: .plan_identifier→.pr_identifier, .plan_id→.pr_id, .plan_number→.pr_number, .plan_url→.pr_url, .plans_repo→.github_repo - Also constructor keyword arg renames - Excludes already-updated files ```
9.
